sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40052" key="e)pilineuth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλῐν-ευτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n40052.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who catches</tr_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with nets</tr_>, prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.93</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.<Thess.>).</sense> </entryFree>
